inline_comments: Strip all `type: "thinking"` content blocks from assistant messages. If an assistant message becomes empty after stripping, it is replaced with a synthetic `{ type: "text", text: "" }` block to preserve turn structure (some providers require strict user/assistant alternation). Returns the original array reference when nothing was changed (callers can use reference equality to skip downstream work).
Preserve the assistant turn even if all blocks were thinking-only.

functions.name: dropThinkingBlocks
functions.doc: Strip all `type: "thinking"` content blocks from assistant messages.     If an assistant message becomes empty after str
